en.title: Cover Letter
en.prompt: In order to submit applications for jobs, I want to write a new cover letter. Please compose a cover letter describing my technical skills. I've been working with web technology for two years. I've worked as a frontend developer for 8 months. I've grown by employing some tools. These include [...Tech Stack], and so on. I wish to develop my full-stack development skills. I desire to lead a T-shaped existence. Can you write a cover letter for a job application about myself?
en.remark: Write a job application letter based on your self-introduction.

metaDescription: Applying for a job? Generate a compelling cover letter highlighting your technical skills and experience.

faq.q: Will the AI fabricate experience I never had?
faq.a: Yes. The AI tends to "fill in" your resume, adding projects or inflating numbers on its own. After the draft, check line by line: every specific project, percentage, and team size must match your real experience. Anything unverifiable must be deleted or rewritten into something provable.

faq.q: How do I tailor it for a specific role like product manager?
faq.a: In the placeholder, list the target JD keywords separately, for example "user research / requirements review / AB testing," and say "the letter must mention each of these keywords at least once." Without pointing them out, the AI writes a one-size-fits-all letter and the hit rate drops significantly.
